events.event_title: Expanded U.S. Export Controls on Advanced AI Chips
events.description: The U.S. government expands export controls restricting the sale of advanced AI chips and semiconductor manufacturing equipment to Chinese firms.
events.source: U.S. Department of Commerce policy announcement
events.narrative_significance: Reinforces the framing of AI compute as a strategic national resource rather than a purely commercial technology.

events.event_title: European Commission Announces Sovereign AI Compute Initiative
events.description: The European Commission announces a large-scale program to build sovereign AI supercomputing infrastructure across the European Union.
events.narrative_significance: Signals growing alignment around technological sovereignty in AI infrastructure.

events.event_title: Hyperscalers Announce Multi-Billion Dollar AI Data Center Expansion
events.description: Major cloud providers announce large-scale investments in AI data centers and GPU clusters to support next-generation AI models.
events.source: Corporate earnings calls and infrastructure announcements
events.narrative_significance: Reinforces the role of hyperscalers as primary infrastructure gatekeepers for AI capability.

events.event_title: Policy Debate Emerges Over Classifying Frontier AI Labs as Strategic Infrastructure
events.description: Policy discussions begin regarding whether major frontier AI labs should be treated as strategic national infrastructure similar to defense contractors or energy systems.
events.source: Policy think tanks and legislative hearings
events.narrative_significance: Introduces a structural reclassification pathway in which AI labs transition from private technology firms to strategically governed entities.
